failures.description: The agent failed by producing an incomplete answer: it omitted qualifying item_id 5312063289 even though the tool result showed it was available, bamboo, a Skateboard, and priced at 195.15, which is greater than 194.56.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to list available Skateboard items with deck material=bamboo costing more than $194.56. The tool output at index 3 contained all required evidence. Comparing prices, four items qualify: 4293355847 ($200.80), 5312063289 ($195.15), 6956751343 ($217.06), and 8176740019 ($208.60). At index 4, the Executor used the tool output but omitted item_id 5312063289, which directly contradicts the returned evidence and reflects partial/misread tool-output reasoning. The later Evaluator approved the incomplete answer and did not resolve the error.
